title: Income Tax: Can you claim bad debt deduction during recovery? ITAT explains
summary: The Ahmedabad ITAT has ruled that businesses can claim a bad debt deduction once the amount is written off in their books and statutory conditions are met, even if recovery proceedings are still pending. The Tribunal also allowed the claim as a business loss under Section 28 of the Income-tax Act.

title: How to improve your credit score from 600 to 750 with smart financial habits and better credit management
summary: A stronger credit score starts with smart habits. You can improve your credit score from 600 to 750 by repaying your debt obligations on time, keeping credit utilisation low, avoiding unnecessary applications and checking your credit report regularly for steady financial progress.

title: ITR 2026: Withdrawing EPF before completing 5 years becomes taxable — Here's how to report it in your tax return
summary: EPF withdrawals are tax-exempt after five years of service. Early withdrawals are taxable unless in specific situations. Here's how they are taxed and how to report such withdrawals in ITR.

title: EPFO discontinues UAN activation on portal: What PF subscribers should know
summary: EPFO has restored its Unified Member Portal after a major upgrade. However, UAN activation and new UAN generation have moved to the UMANG app. Here's everything PF subscribers need to know.

title: 5 red flags investors should watch out for before choosing a financial product
summary: If an investment product promises exceptionally high returns and claims little or no risk to the amount invested, you should consider it as a clear red flag.

title: Sebi open market share buy-back norms explained: Eligibility, timeline and impact
summary: Sebi has approved the reintroduction of share buy-backs through the open market route from 1 August 2026. The buy-back timelines have been reduced, and promoters are not allowed to participate.

title: Is it a bank holiday today? Check RBI calendar to know if SBI, HDFC, ICICI, others are open or closed on 4 July
summary: Check RBI calendar to know if SBI, HDFC, ICICI, others are open or closed on 4 July. RBI's holiday schedule provides comprehensive detail about non-working days for banks under Negotiable Instruments Act and other under Banks’ Closing of Accounts in addition to weekend offs.

title: You can now add, update email to Aadhaar for free: Check how, last date and other details
summary: UIDAI is now allowing people to add or update email IDs to their Aadhaar card directly through the mobile application. The service was enabled on 1 July 2026 and will be free to use for six months.

title: ITR filing 2026: Gifts, inheritance and rural agricultural land sale receipts can now be reported separately
summary: The new income tax form initially lacked a section for certain tax exempt receipts. Now, it includes an additional dropdown for ‘Receipts not in the nature of income’. Experts decode what this news head means for taxpayers.

title: Dearness Allowance: Could employees get 3-4% DA hike announcement this month? Here's what the numbers indicate
summary: Dearness Allowance: DA is revised twice a year in line with the All-India Consumer Price Index (AICPI) to match the cost of living. Here's a look at the numbers and whether employees could get a 3-4% DA hike this month.

title: On Bond Street, falling yields spur a Rs 17,000-crore fundraise
summary: Indian institutions secured over ₹17,000 crore via bond sales as falling benchmark yields made borrowing cheaper. Nabard notably raised ₹8,000 crore at a competitive 7.16% for three-year debt. This surge in issuances is attributed to favorable market sentiment, central bank measures, and expectation

summary: The Indian rupee strengthened on Friday, ending its four-day decline to close at 94.21 against the dollar. title: Inspira seals Rs 1,800-crore private credit for Burger King buy in India

summary: Adani Enterprises successfully raised ₹15,000 crore through a qualified institutional placement, attracting significant interest from both foreign investors like Capital Group and Goldman Sachs, and domestic mutual funds. title: Sebi tweaks rules on handling of unpaid securities
summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has simplified rules for stockbrokers handling unpaid client securities. title: FMCG, healthcare in line for strong show in FY27: Brickworks
summary: India's consumer goods and healthcare sectors are poised for robust growth this fiscal year, driven by tax relief, increasing consumer spending, and a booming medical tourism industry. title: HDFC Bank Q1 business update: Gross advances rise 15% to Rs 30.61 lakh crore
summary: HDFC Bank has announced robust financial results for the April-June quarter of FY27. Gross advances surged 15.4% year-on-year to Rs 30.61 lakh crore. title: Dollar set for biggest weekly drop since April after jobs data lowers Fed hike bets
summary: The US dollar is experiencing its biggest weekly loss in 12 weeks, driven by weaker-than-expected US jobs data that has dampened expectations for an imminent Federal Reserve rate hike. title: Gold heads for weekly gain as weak US jobs data tempers rate hike bets
summary: Gold prices surged on Friday, poised for a weekly gain after a disappointing U.S. jobs report significantly lowered expectations for an imminent Federal Reserve interest rate hike.
